269: function buildEvidence(
270:   deploymentEvents: Array<{ eventType: string; payload: unknown; seq: number }>,
271:   deployment: { deployedUrl: string | null },
272:   resultArtifact: Record<string, unknown>,
273:   includeValidationEvidence: boolean,
274:   agentEvidence?: ReviewEvidenceItem | null
275: ): ReviewEvidenceItem[] {
276:   const evidence: ReviewEvidenceItem[] = includeValidationEvidence
277:     ? deploymentEvents
278:         .filter((event) => {
279:           return [
280:             'validation_started',
281:             'validation_skipped',
282:             'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
283:             'deployment_provider_created',
284:             'deployment_provider_status',
285:             'deployment_succeeded',
286:           ].includes(event.eventType);
287:         })
288:         .map((event) => ({
289:           id: `ev_${event.seq}`,
290:           type: event.eventType,
291:           label: event.eventType.replaceAll('_', ' '),
292:           status: statusFromEventType(event.eventType, asRecord(event.payload)),
293:           metadata: asRecord(event.payload),
294:         }))
295:     : [];
296: 
297:   if (includeValidationEvidence && deployment.deployedUrl) {
298:     evidence.push({
299:       id: 'ev_deployed_url',
300:       type: 'deploy_probe',
301:       label: 'Deployed URL present',
302:       status: 'passed',
303:       metadata: { url: deployment.deployedUrl },
304:     });
305:   }
306:   if (
307:     includeValidationEvidence &&
308:     (typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' || typeof resultArtifact.sourceSnapshotSha256 === 'string')
309:   ) {
310:     evidence.push({
311:       id: 'ev_artifact',
312:       type: 'artifact',
313:       label: 'Deployment artifact recorded',
314:       status: 'info',
315:       metadata: resultArtifact,
316:     });
317:   }
318:   if (agentEvidence) {
319:     evidence.push(agentEvidence);
320:   }
321: 
322:   return evidence;
323: }
324: 
325: function deriveRiskLevel(findings: ReviewFinding[], fallback: ReviewSeverity = 'low'): ReviewSeverity {
326:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'critical')) {
327:     return 'critical';
328:   }
329:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'high')) {
330:     return 'high';
331:   }
332:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'medium')) {
333:     return 'medium';
334:   }
335:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'low')) {
336:     return 'low';
337:   }
338:   return fallback;
339: }
340: 
341: function deriveRecommendation(findings: ReviewFinding[]): ReviewRecommendation {
342:   const riskLevel = deriveRiskLevel(findings);
343:   if (riskLevel === 'critical' || riskLevel === 'high') {
344:     return 'request_changes';
345:   }
346:   if (riskLevel === 'medium' || riskLevel === 'low') {
347:     return findings.length > 0 ? 'comment' : 'approve';
348:   }
349:   return 'approve';
350: }

352: function sanitizeIntentBlock(intent: {
353:   goal: string | null;
354:   constraints: string[];
355:   decisions: string[];
356: }): { goal: string | null; constraints: string[]; decisions: string[] } {
357:   return {
358:     goal: redactReviewText(intent.goal),
359:     constraints: intent.constraints.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
360:     decisions: intent.decisions.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
361:   };
362: }

364: function parseChangedPathsFromDiff(patch: string): string[] {
365:   const paths = new Set<string>();
366:   for (const line of patch.split('\n')) {
367:     if (!line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
368:       continue;
369:     }
370:     const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
371:     if (!raw || raw === '/dev/null') {
372:       continue;
373:     }
374:     const normalized = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
375:     if (!normalized || normalized === '/dev/null') {
376:       continue;
377:     }
378:     paths.add(normalized);
379:   }
380:   return Array.from(paths);
381: }
382: 
383: function parseDiffHunks(patch: string): Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> {
384:   const lines = patch.split('\n');
385:   const hunks: Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> = [];
386:   let currentPath: string | null = null;
387:   let currentLines: string[] = [];
388: 
389:   const flush = () => {
390:     if (!currentPath) {
391:       return;
392:     }
393:     hunks.push({
394:       path: currentPath,
395:       patch: currentLines.join('\n').trim(),
396:     });
397:   };
398: 
399:   for (const line of lines) {
400:     if (line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
401:       flush();
402:       const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
403:       currentPath = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
404:       currentLines = [line];
405:       continue;
406:     }
407:     if (currentPath) {
408:       currentLines.push(line);
409:     }
410:   }
411: 
412:   flush();
413:   return hunks.filter((hunk) => hunk.path && hunk.path !== '/dev/null');
414: }
415: 
416: function parentDirectories(path: string): string[] {
417:   const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
418:   const dirs = [''];
419:   let current = '';
420:   for (let index = 0; index < parts.length - 1; index += 1) {
421:     current = current ? `${current}/${parts[index]}` : parts[index] as string;
422:     dirs.push(current);
423:   }
424:   return dirs;
425: }

427: const CONVENTION_PATTERNS = [
428:   'AGENTS.md',
429:   'CODE_REVIEW.md',
430:   'CONTRIBUTING.md',
431:   '.editorconfig',
432:   '.eslintrc',
433:   '.eslintrc.js',
434:   '.eslintrc.cjs',
435:   '.eslintrc.json',
436:   '.eslintrc.yaml',
437:   '.eslintrc.yml',
438:   'eslint.config.js',
439:   'eslint.config.mjs',
440:   'eslint.config.cjs',
441:   'biome.json',
442:   'biome.jsonc',
443:   'prettier.config.js',
444:   'prettier.config.mjs',
445:   'prettier.config.cjs',
446:   '.prettierrc',
447:   '.prettierrc.json',
448:   '.prettierrc.yaml',
449:   '.prettierrc.yml',
450:   'pyproject.toml',
451:   'ruff.toml',
452:   'mypy.ini',
453:   'tsconfig.json',
454:   'tsconfig.base.json',
455:   'tsconfig.app.json',
456:   'tsconfig.node.json',
457: ] as const;
458: 
459: function discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths: string[], maxCount = 10): string[] {
460:   const candidates = new Set<string>();
461:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
462:     const dirs = parentDirectories(changedPath);
463:     for (const dir of dirs) {
464:       for (const pattern of CONVENTION_PATTERNS) {
465:         const candidate = dir ? `${dir}/${pattern}` : pattern;
466:         candidates.add(candidate);
467:         if (candidates.size >= maxCount * 6) {
468:           return Array.from(candidates);
469:         }
470:       }
471:     }
472:   }
473:   return Array.from(candidates);
474: }

476: function estimateTokenCount(parts: string[]): number {
477:   const chars = parts.reduce((total, part) => total + part.length, 0);
478:   return Math.ceil(chars / 4);
479: }
480: 
481: function readOptionalString(value: unknown): string | null {
482:   return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() ? value.trim() : null;
483: }
484: 
485: function readOptionalNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
486:   return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : null;
487: }
488: 
489: function stripSensitiveTokenFields(value: unknown): unknown {
490:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
491:     return value.map((item) => stripSensitiveTokenFields(item));
492:   }
493:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
494:     if (typeof value === 'string' && GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST.test(value)) {
495:       return value.replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]');
496:     }
497:     return value;
498:   }
499:   const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
500:   return Object.entries(record).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
501:     const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
502:     if (
503:       normalizedKey === 'x-review-github-token' ||
504:       normalizedKey === 'review_context_github_token' ||
505:       normalizedKey === 'authorization'
506:     ) {
507:       return result;
508:     }
509:     result[key] = stripSensitiveTokenFields(nested);
510:     return result;
511:   }, {});
512: }

514: function resolveReviewAnalysisModel(payload: Record<string, unknown>, env: Env): string {
515:   const requested = readOptionalString(payload.model);
516:   if (requested) {
517:     return requested;
518:   }
519:   const reviewModel = readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_MODEL);
520:   if (reviewModel) {
521:     return reviewModel;
522:   }
523:   const agentModel = readOptionalString(env.AGENT_MODEL);
524:   if (agentModel) {
525:     return agentModel;
526:   }
527:   return DEFAULT_REVIEW_MODEL;
528: }

530: function mergeProvenance(
531:   deploymentProvenance: Record<string, unknown>,
532:   reviewProvenance: Record<string, unknown>
533: ): Record<string, unknown> {
534:   const merged: Record<string, unknown> = {
535:     ...deploymentProvenance,
536:     ...reviewProvenance,
537:   };
538: 
539:   const deploymentSessionIds = parseStringArray(deploymentProvenance.sessionIds);
540:   const reviewSessionIds = parseStringArray(reviewProvenance.sessionIds);
541:   const mergedSessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...deploymentSessionIds, ...reviewSessionIds]));
542:   if (mergedSessionIds.length > 0) {
543:     merged.sessionIds = mergedSessionIds;
544:   }
545: 
546:   const deploymentIntent = parseStringArray(deploymentProvenance.intentSessionContext);
547:   const reviewIntent = parseStringArray(reviewProvenance.intentSessionContext);
548:   const mergedIntent = Array.from(new Set([...deploymentIntent, ...reviewIntent]));
549:   if (mergedIntent.length > 0) {
550:     merged.intentSessionContext = mergedIntent;
551:   }
552: 
553:   return merged;
554: }

556: function parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(record: Record<string, unknown>): string[] {
557:   const candidates = [record.touchedFiles, record.touched_files, record.files_touched, record.changedFiles, record.changed_files, record.files];
558:   for (const candidate of candidates) {
559:     if (!Array.isArray(candidate)) {
560:       continue;
561:     }
562:     const parsed = candidate
563:       .flatMap((item) => {
564:         if (typeof item === 'string') {
565:           return [item.trim()];
566:         }
567:         const entry = asRecord(item);
568:         const path = readOptionalString(entry.path);
569:         return path ? [path] : [];
570:       })
571:       .filter(Boolean);
572:     if (parsed.length > 0) {
573:       return parsed;
574:     }
575:   }
576:   return [];
577: }

579: function buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken: string): Record<string, string> {
580:   const headers: Record<string, string> = {
581:     Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
582:     'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
583:     'User-Agent': 'nimbus-worker/1.0',
584:   };
585:   headers.Authorization = githubToken.toLowerCase().startsWith('bearer ') ? githubToken : `Bearer ${githubToken}`;
586:   return headers;
587: }
588: 
589: async function fetchGitHubJson(url: string, githubToken: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
590:   const response = await fetch(url, {
591:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken),
592:   });
593: 
594:   if (!response.ok) {
595:     const rateLimited =
596:       response.status === 429 ||
597:       (response.status === 403 && (response.headers.get('x-ratelimit-remaining') ?? '').trim() === '0');
598:     const responseBody = redactReviewText(await response.text());
599:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
600:       'review_context_github_api_error',
601:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}${rateLimited ? ' [rate_limited]' : ''}`,
602:       responseBody
603:     );
604:   }
605: 
606:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
607:   return asRecord(data);
608: }
609: 
610: async function fetchGitHubArray(url: string, githubToken: string): Promise<unknown[]> {
611:   const response = await fetch(url, {
612:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken),
613:   });
614: 
615:   if (!response.ok) {
616:     const rateLimited =
617:       response.status === 429 ||
618:       (response.status === 403 && (response.headers.get('x-ratelimit-remaining') ?? '').trim() === '0');
619:     const responseBody = redactReviewText(await response.text());
620:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
621:       'review_context_github_api_error',
622:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}${rateLimited ? ' [rate_limited]' : ''}`,
623:       responseBody
624:     );
625:   }
626: 
627:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
628:   return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
629: }

631: function classifyCochangeSkipReason(error: unknown): string {
632:   if (error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError && /\[rate_limited\]/.test(error.message)) {
633:     return 'rate_limited';
634:   }
635:   return 'github_api_error';
636: }

638: async function fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(
639:   repo: string,
640:   changedPaths: string[],
641:   lookbackSessions: number,
642:   githubToken: string
643: ): Promise<{
644:   relatedByChangedPath: Record<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>>;
645:   sessionsScanned: number;
646: }> {
647:   const commits = await fetchGitHubArray(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits?sha=entire/checkpoints/v1&per_page=${lookbackSessions}`, githubToken);
648: 
649:   const frequencyByChangedPath = new Map<string, Map<string, { count: number; sessions: Set<string> }>>();
650:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
651:     frequencyByChangedPath.set(changedPath, new Map());
652:   }
653:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
654: 
655:   for (const commit of commits.slice(0, lookbackSessions)) {
656:     const commitRecord = asRecord(commit);
657:     const sha = readOptionalString(commitRecord.sha);
658:     if (!sha) {
659:       continue;
660:     }
661: 
662:     const detail = await fetchGitHubJson(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits/${sha}`, githubToken);
663:     const files = Array.isArray(detail.files) ? detail.files : [];
664:     const metadataPaths = files
665:       .map((entry) => readOptionalString(asRecord(entry).filename))
666:       .filter((path): path is string => Boolean(path && path.endsWith('/metadata.json')))
667:       .slice(0, 3);
668: 
669:     const touchedFiles = new Set<string>();
670:     for (const metadataPath of metadataPaths) {
671:       const file = await fetchGitHubJson(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/contents/${metadataPath}?ref=${sha}`, githubToken);
672:       const content = readOptionalString(file.content);
673:       if (!content) {
674:         continue;
675:       }
676:       let decoded = '';
677:       try {
678:         decoded = atob(content.replace(/\n/g, ''));
679:       } catch {
680:         continue;
681:       }
682:       try {
683:         const metadata = JSON.parse(decoded) as unknown;
684:         for (const path of parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(asRecord(metadata))) {
685:           touchedFiles.add(path);
686:         }
687:       } catch {
688:         continue;
689:       }
690:     }
691: 
692:     if (touchedFiles.size === 0) {
693:       continue;
694:     }
695: 
696:     sessionsScanned += 1;
697:     for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
698:       if (!touchedFiles.has(changedPath)) {
699:         continue;
700:       }
701:       const frequency = frequencyByChangedPath.get(changedPath);
702:       if (!frequency) {
703:         continue;
704:       }
705:       for (const path of touchedFiles) {
706:         if (path === changedPath) {
707:           continue;
708:         }
709:         const next = frequency.get(path) ?? { count: 0, sessions: new Set<string>() };
710:         next.count += 1;
711:         next.sessions.add(sha);
712:         frequency.set(path, next);
713:       }
714:     }
715:   }
716: 
717:   const relatedByChangedPath: Record<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>> = {};
718:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
719:     const frequency =
720:       frequencyByChangedPath.get(changedPath) ?? new Map<string, { count: number; sessions: Set<string> }>();
721:     relatedByChangedPath[changedPath] = Array.from(frequency.entries())
722:       .map(([path, value]) => ({
723:         path,
724:         frequency: value.count,
725:         sessionIds: Array.from(value.sessions),
726:       }))
727:       .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency);
728:   }
729: 
730:   return {
731:     relatedByChangedPath,
732:     sessionsScanned,
733:   };
734: }
735: 
736: async function assembleReviewContextBootstrap(
737:   env: Env,
738:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
739:   reviewPayload: Record<string, unknown>,
740:   options?: ReviewRunExecutionOptions
741: ): Promise<ReviewContext> {
742:   const COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS = 5;
743:   const COCHANGE_TOP_N = 20;
744:   const CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT = 10;
745: 
746:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
747:     reviewId: review.id,
748:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_started',
749:     payload: {
750:       source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
751:     },
752:   });
753: 
754:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, review.workspaceId);
755:   const checkpointId = workspace?.checkpointId?.trim() ?? '';
756:   if (!checkpointId) {
757:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
758:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
759:       'Review context assembly requires an Entire checkpoint-backed workspace with a checkpointId.'
760:     );
761:   }
762: 
763:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
764:   if (!deployment) {
765:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError('review_context_deployment_not_found', `Deployment ${review.deploymentId} was not found.`);
766:   }
767: 
768:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
769:   const deploymentRequestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
770:   const reviewRequestProvenance = asRecord(reviewPayload.provenance);
771:   const requestProvenance = mergeProvenance(deploymentRequestProvenance, reviewRequestProvenance);
772:   const sessionIds = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds));
773:   if (sessionIds.length === 0) {
774:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
775:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
776:       'Review context assembly requires at least one Entire sessionId in deployment provenance.'
777:     );
778:   }
779: 
780:   const sessionId = sessionIds[0] ?? '';
781:   const sessionIntentCandidates = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext));
782:   const sessionIntent = sessionIntentCandidates[0] ?? null;
783:   const attributionTrailer = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.attributionTrailer);
784:   const agentType = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.agentType);
785:   const requestedTokenBudget =
786:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.reviewContextTokenBudget) ??
787:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.contextTokenBudget) ??
788:     null;
789:   const configuredTokenBudget = readOptionalNumber(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET);
790:   const tokenBudget = requestedTokenBudget ?? configuredTokenBudget ?? null;
791: 
792:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
793:     reviewId: review.id,
794:     eventType: 'review_context_checkpoint_context_collected',
795:     payload: {
796:       checkpointId,
797:       sessionId,
798:       sessionCount: sessionIds.length,
799:       hasSessionIntent: Boolean(sessionIntent),
800:     },
801:   });
802: 
803:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
804:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
805:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
806:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
807:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
808:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
809:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
810:       : null;
811:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
812:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
813:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
814:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
815:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
816:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
817:         : null;
818: 
819:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
820:     env,
821:     review.workspaceId,
822:     provenanceOperationId,
823:     reviewDiffArtifactId
824:   );
825:   const commitDiffPatch = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.commitDiffPatch);
826:   const authoritativeDiffPatch = readOptionalString(authoritativeDiff?.patch);
827:   const diffPatch = authoritativeDiffPatch ?? commitDiffPatch ?? null;
828:   if (!diffPatch) {
829:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
830:       'review_context_diff_missing',
831:       'Review context assembly requires non-empty diff patch context. Ensure deployment provenance includes review diff artifact or commit diff patch.'
832:     );
833:   }
834:   const changedPaths = diffPatch ? parseChangedPathsFromDiff(diffPatch) : [];
835:   const diffHunks = diffPatch ? parseDiffHunks(diffPatch) : [];
836: 
837:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
838:     reviewId: review.id,
839:     eventType: 'review_context_diff_collected',
840:     payload: {
841:       source: authoritativeDiffPatch ? authoritativeDiff?.source ?? null : commitDiffPatch ? 'commit_patch' : null,
842:       artifactId: authoritativeDiffPatch ? authoritativeDiff?.artifactId ?? null : null,
843:       hasDiff: Boolean(diffPatch),
844:       patchBytes: diffPatch ? new TextEncoder().encode(diffPatch).byteLength : 0,
845:       fallbackUsed: !authoritativeDiffPatch && Boolean(commitDiffPatch),
846:     },
847:   });
848: 
849:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
850:     reviewId: review.id,
851:     eventType: 'review_context_changed_files_collected',
852:     payload: {
853:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
854:     },
855:   });
856: 
857:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
858:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
859:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
860:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
861:   if (!deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
862:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
863:       'review_context_source_bundle_missing',
864:       'Review context assembly requires deployment source bundle key.'
865:     );
866:   }
867: 
868:   const changedFileReads = changedPaths.length
869:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
870:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
871:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-changed`,
872:         paths: changedPaths,
873:       })
874:     : [];
875:   const changedFiles = changedFileReads
876:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
877:     .map((item) => ({
878:       path: item.path,
879:       content: item.content ?? '',
880:       byteSize: item.bytes,
881:       source: 'changed' as const,
882:     }));
883: 
884:   const conventionCandidates = discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT);
885:   const conventionReads = conventionCandidates.length
886:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
887:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
888:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-conventions`,
889:         paths: conventionCandidates,
890:       })
891:     : [];
892:   const conventionFiles = conventionReads
893:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
894:     .slice(0, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT)
895:     .map((item) => ({
896:       path: item.path,
897:       content: item.content ?? '',
898:       byteSize: item.bytes,
899:       source: 'convention' as const,
900:     }));
901: 
902:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
903:     reviewId: review.id,
904:     eventType: 'review_context_conventions_collected',
905:     payload: {
906:       candidateCount: conventionCandidates.length,
907:       conventionFileCount: conventionFiles.length,
908:       maxCount: CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT,
909:     },
910:   });
911: 
912:   const repoSlug =
913:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repo) ??
914:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repository) ??
915:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_REPO);
916:   if (!repoSlug) {
917:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
918:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
919:       'Review context assembly requires repository slug in deployment provenance (provenance.repo).'
920:     );
921:   }
922:   let relatedFiles: Array<{
923:     path: string;
924:     content: string;
925:     byteSize: number;
926:     source: 'related';
927:     score: number;
928:     coChangeFrequency: number;
929:     supportingSessionIds: string[];
930:   }> = [];
931:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
932:   let coChangeSkipped = false;
933:   let coChangeSkipReason: string | null = null;
934:   let coChangeAvailable = false;
935:   const githubToken = readOptionalString(options?.cochangeGithubToken) ?? readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN);
936: 
937:   if (!githubToken) {
938:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
939:       'review_context_github_token_missing',
940:       'co-change retrieval requires a GitHub token - set REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN in your local .env'
941:     );
942:   } else {
943:     try {
944:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
945:         reviewId: review.id,
946:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_started',
947:         payload: {
948:           repo: repoSlug,
949:           lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
950:         },
951:       });
952: 
953:       const relatedFrequency = new Map<string, { frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>();
954:       const entriesByChangedPath = new Map<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>>();
955:       const changedPathsMissingCache: string[] = [];
956:       const cachedRows = await getReviewCochangeCacheBatch(env.DB, {
957:         repo: repoSlug,
958:         filePaths: changedPaths,
959:       });
960:       const cacheByPath = new Map(cachedRows.map((row) => [row.filePath, row]));
961: 
962:       for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
963:         const cached = cacheByPath.get(changedPath);
964:         const entries = cached?.cochange;
965:         const cachedLookbackSessions = cached?.lookbackSessions ?? null;
966:         if (entries && cachedLookbackSessions === COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS) {
967:           entriesByChangedPath.set(changedPath, entries);
968:         } else {
969:           changedPathsMissingCache.push(changedPath);
970:         }
971:       }
972: 
973:       if (changedPathsMissingCache.length > 0) {
974:         const fetched = await fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(repoSlug, changedPathsMissingCache, COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS, githubToken);
975:         sessionsScanned += fetched.sessionsScanned;
976:         const cacheUpserts: Array<{
977:           filePath: string;
978:           repo: string;
979:           branch: string;
980:           cochange: Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>;
981:           lookbackSessions: number;
982:         }> = [];
983:         for (const changedPath of changedPathsMissingCache) {
984:           const entries = fetched.relatedByChangedPath[changedPath] ?? [];
985:           entriesByChangedPath.set(changedPath, entries);
986:           cacheUpserts.push({
987:             filePath: changedPath,
988:             repo: repoSlug,
989:             branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
990:             cochange: entries,
991:             lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
992:           });
993:         }
994:         await upsertReviewCochangeCacheBatch(env.DB, cacheUpserts);
995:       }
996: 
997:       for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
998:         const entries = entriesByChangedPath.get(changedPath) ?? [];
999:         for (const entry of entries) {
1000:           const existing = relatedFrequency.get(entry.path) ?? { frequency: 0, sessionIds: [] };
1001:           existing.frequency += entry.frequency;
1002:           existing.sessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...existing.sessionIds, ...entry.sessionIds]));
1003:           relatedFrequency.set(entry.path, existing);
1004:         }
1005:       }
1006: 
1007:       const changedPathSet = new Set(changedPaths);
1008:       const rankedRelated = Array.from(relatedFrequency.entries())
1009:         .map(([path, value]) => ({ path, ...value }))
1010:         .filter((item) => !changedPathSet.has(item.path))
1011:         .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency)
1012:         .slice(0, COCHANGE_TOP_N);
1013: 
1014:       const relatedReads = rankedRelated.length
1015:         ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
1016:             sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
1017:             sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-related`,
1018:             paths: rankedRelated.map((item) => item.path),
1019:           })
1020:         : [];
1021:       const readByPath = new Map(relatedReads.map((item) => [item.path, item]));
1022:       relatedFiles = rankedRelated
1023:         .flatMap((item) => {
1024:           const read = readByPath.get(item.path);
1025:           if (!read || read.content === null || read.error) {
1026:             return [];
1027:           }
1028:           return [
1029:             {
1030:               path: item.path,
1031:               content: read.content,
1032:               byteSize: read.bytes,
1033:               source: 'related' as const,
1034:               score: item.frequency,
1035:               coChangeFrequency: item.frequency,
1036:               supportingSessionIds: item.sessionIds,
1037:             },
1038:           ];
1039:         });
1040:       coChangeAvailable = relatedFiles.length > 0;
1041: 
1042:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1043:         reviewId: review.id,
1044:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_completed',
1045:         payload: {
1046:           repo: repoSlug,
1047:           relatedFileCount: relatedFiles.length,
1048:           topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
1049:         },
1050:       });
1051:     } catch (error) {
1052:       const reason = classifyCochangeSkipReason(error);
1053:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1054:         reviewId: review.id,
1055:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_failed',
1056:         payload: {
1057:           reason,
1058:           repo: repoSlug,
1059:           lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
1060:           githubResponseBody:
1061:             error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError ? error.details : redactReviewText(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)),
1062:         },
1063:       });
1064:       if (error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError) {
1065:         throw error;
1066:       }
1067:       throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1068:         'review_context_github_api_error',
1069:         `Co-change context retrieval failed (${reason}).`
1070:       );
1071:     }
1072:   }
1073: 
1074:   const assembledAt = new Date().toISOString();
1075:   const contextId = generateReviewContextId();
1076:   const contextPayload: ReviewContext = {
1077:     id: contextId,
1078:     reviewId: review.id,
1079:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1080:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1081:     commitSha: workspace?.commitSha ?? '',
1082:     assembledAt,
1083:     checkpoint: {
1084:       checkpointId,
1085:       branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
1086:       attributionTrailer,
1087:       session: {
1088:         sessionId,
1089:         agentType,
1090:         sessionIntent,
1091:       },
1092:     },
1093:     retrieval: {
1094:       changedFiles,
1095:       diffHunks,
1096:       relatedFiles,
1097:       conventionFiles,
1098:       coChange: {
1099:         source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
1100:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
1101:         sessionsScanned,
1102:         filesConsidered: changedPaths.length,
1103:         topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
1104:         coChangeSkipped,
1105:         coChangeSkipReason,
1106:         coChangeAvailable,
1107:       },
1108:     },
1109:     stats: {
1110:       totalFilesIncluded: changedFiles.length + relatedFiles.length + conventionFiles.length,
1111:       totalBytesIncluded:
1112:         changedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
1113:         relatedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
1114:         conventionFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0),
1115:       estimatedTokens: estimateTokenCount([
1116:         diffPatch ?? '',
1117:         ...changedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1118:         ...relatedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1119:         ...conventionFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1120:       ]),
1121:       tokenBudget,
1122:     },
1123:   };
1124: 
1125:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1126:     reviewId: review.id,
1127:     eventType: 'review_context_budget_checked',
1128:     payload: {
1129:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1130:       tokenBudget,
1131:       tokenBudgetSource:
1132:         requestedTokenBudget !== null
1133:           ? 'request_provenance'
1134:           : configuredTokenBudget !== null
1135:             ? 'configured_env'
1136:             : 'unconfigured',
1137:       exceeded: tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget,
1138:     },
1139:   });
1140: 
1141:   if (tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget) {
1142:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1143:       'review_context_budget_exceeded',
1144:       `ReviewContext estimated token usage (${contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens}) exceeds configured budget (${tokenBudget}). Increase the budget and retry.`
1145:     );
1146:   }
1147: 
1148:   const storageBucketCandidates = [env.REVIEW_CONTEXTS, env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, env.SOURCE_BUNDLES];
1149:   const storageBucket = storageBucketCandidates.find(
1150:     (bucket): bucket is R2Bucket => Boolean(bucket && typeof bucket.put === 'function')
1151:   );
1152:   if (!storageBucket) {
1153:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1154:       'review_context_storage_unavailable',
1155:       'REVIEW_CONTEXTS, WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, or SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is required for review context assembly.'
1156:     );
1157:   }
1158: 
1159:   const r2Key = `review-context/${review.id}/${contextId}.json`;
1160:   const serialized = JSON.stringify(stripSensitiveTokenFields(contextPayload));
1161:   await storageBucket.put(r2Key, serialized, {
1162:     httpMetadata: {
1163:       contentType: 'application/json',
1164:     },
1165:   });
1166:   const ref = await createReviewContextBlobReference(env.DB, {
1167:     id: contextId,
1168:     reviewId: review.id,
1169:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1170:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1171:     r2Key,
1172:     byteSize: new TextEncoder().encode(serialized).byteLength,
1173:     estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1174:   });
1175: 
1176:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1177:     reviewId: review.id,
1178:     eventType: 'review_context_stored',
1179:     payload: {
1180:       contextId: ref.id,
1181:       r2Key: ref.r2Key,
1182:       totalFilesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
1183:       totalBytesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
1184:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1185:     },
1186:   });
1187: 
1188:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1189:     reviewId: review.id,
1190:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_succeeded',
1191:     payload: {
1192:       checkpointId,
1193:       sessionId,
1194:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
1195:       contextId: ref.id,
1196:     },
1197:   });
1198: 
1199:   return contextPayload;
1200: }
1201: 
1202: async function loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1203:   env: Env,
1204:   workspaceId: string,
1205:   operationId: string | null,
1206:   reviewDiffArtifactId: string | null
1207: ): Promise<{ source: 'artifact_patch'; artifactId: string; patch: string } | null> {
1208:   const getArtifactObject = async (objectKey: string): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null> => {
1209:     const fromArtifacts = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(objectKey) : null;
1210:     if (fromArtifacts) {
1211:       return fromArtifacts;
1212:     }
1213:     return env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(objectKey) : null;
1214:   };
1215: 
1216:   if (reviewDiffArtifactId) {
1217:     const reviewArtifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, reviewDiffArtifactId);
1218:     if (reviewArtifact && reviewArtifact.artifact.type === 'patch') {
1219:       const object = await getArtifactObject(reviewArtifact.objectKey);
1220:       if (!object) {
1221:         return null;
1222:       }
1223:       return {
1224:         source: 'artifact_patch',
1225:         artifactId: reviewDiffArtifactId,
1226:         patch: await object.text(),
1227:       };
1228:     }
1229:   }
1230: 
1231:   if (!operationId) {
1232:     return null;
1233:   }
1234: 
1235:   const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1236:   if (!operation || operation.type !== 'export_patch' || operation.status !== 'succeeded') {
1237:     return null;
1238:   }
1239: 
1240:   const result = asRecord(operation.result);
1241:   const artifactId = typeof result.artifactId === 'string' ? result.artifactId.trim() : '';
1242:   if (!artifactId) {
1243:     return null;
1244:   }
1245: 
1246:   const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
1247:   if (!artifact || artifact.artifact.type !== 'patch') {
1248:     return null;
1249:   }
1250: 
1251:   const object = await getArtifactObject(artifact.objectKey);
1252:   if (!object) {
1253:     return null;
1254:   }
1255: 
1256:   return {
1257:     source: 'artifact_patch',
1258:     artifactId,
1259:     patch: await object.text(),
1260:   };
1261: }
1262: 
1263: async function buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(
1264:   env: Env,
1265:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1266:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1267:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1268: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1269:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
1270:   if (!deployment) {
1271:     throw new Error(`Deployment not found for review target ${review.deploymentId}`);
1272:   }
1273: 
1274:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
1275:   const deploymentEvents = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId, 0, 500);
1276:   const reviewPolicy = asRecord(payload.policy);
1277:   const reviewFormat = asRecord(payload.format);
1278:   const reviewAnalysisModel = resolveReviewAnalysisModel(payload, env);
1279:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);

487:   }
488:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
489:     if (typeof value === 'string' && GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST.test(value)) {
490:       return value.replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]');
491:     }
492:     return value;
493:   }
494:   const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
495:   return Object.entries(record).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
496:     const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
497:     if (
498:       normalizedKey === 'x-review-github-token' ||
499:       normalizedKey === 'review_context_github_token' ||
500:       normalizedKey === 'authorization'
501:     ) {
502:       return result;
503:     }
504:     result[key] = stripSensitiveTokenFields(nested);
505:     return result;
506:   }, {});
507: }

641: function toReviewFindingRecord(value: unknown): ReviewFinding[] {
642:   if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
643:     return [];
644:   }
645: 
646:   // Phase 2 contract: strict V2 query surfaces intentionally exclude legacy finding shapes.
647:   // We do not attempt semantic V1->V2 conversion at read time because legacy reports were
648:   // generated without full ReviewContext and are not trustworthy for canonical V2 semantics.
649:   return value.flatMap((item) => {
650:     const record = item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item) ? (item as Record<string, unknown>) : null;
651:     if (!record) {
652:       return [];
653:     }
654: 
655:     const severity = typeof record.severity === 'string' ? record.severity.trim() : '';
656:     const category = typeof record.category === 'string' ? record.category.trim() : '';
657:     const passType = typeof record.passType === 'string' ? record.passType.trim() : '';
658:     const description = typeof record.description === 'string' ? record.description.trim() : '';
659:     const suggestedFix = typeof record.suggestedFix === 'string' ? record.suggestedFix.trim() : '';
660:     if (!severity || !category || !passType || !description) {
661:       return [];
662:     }
663: 
664:     if (!['info', 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'].includes(severity)) {
665:       return [];
666:     }
667:     if (!['security', 'logic', 'style', 'breaking-change'].includes(category)) {
668:       return [];
669:     }
670:     if (passType !== 'single') {
671:       return [];
672:     }
673: 
674:     const locationsRaw = Array.isArray(record.locations) ? record.locations : [];
675:     const locations = locationsRaw.flatMap((locationItem) => {
676:       const location =
677:         locationItem && typeof locationItem === 'object' && !Array.isArray(locationItem)
678:           ? (locationItem as Record<string, unknown>)
679:           : null;
680:       if (!location) {
681:         return [];
682:       }
683: 
684:       const filePath = typeof location.filePath === 'string' ? location.filePath.trim() : '';
685:       if (!filePath) {
686:         return [];
687:       }
688:       const startLine = location.startLine;
689:       const endLine = location.endLine;
690:       const nullRange = startLine === null && endLine === null;
691:       const numericRange =
692:         typeof startLine === 'number' &&
693:         Number.isInteger(startLine) &&
694:         startLine > 0 &&
695:         typeof endLine === 'number' &&
696:         Number.isInteger(endLine) &&
697:         endLine >= startLine;
698:       if (!nullRange && !numericRange) {
699:         return [];
700:       }
701: 
702:       return [
703:         {
704:           filePath,
705:           startLine: nullRange ? null : (startLine as number),
706:           endLine: nullRange ? null : (endLine as number),
707:         },
708:       ];
709:     });
710: 
711:     if (locations.length === 0) {
712:       return [];
713:     }
714: 
715:     return [
716:       {
717:         severity: severity as ReviewFinding['severity'],
718:         category: category as ReviewFinding['category'],
719:         passType: passType as ReviewFinding['passType'],
720:         locations,
721:         description,
722:         suggestedFix,
723:       },
724:     ];
725:   });
726: }

728: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
729:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
730:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
731:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
732: 
733:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
734:     id: record.id,
735:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
736:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
737:     target: {
738:       type: record.target_type,
739:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
740:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
741:     },
742:     mode: record.mode,
743:     status: record.status,
744:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
745:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
746:     startedAt: record.started_at,
747:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
748:     createdAt: record.created_at,
749:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
750:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
751:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
752:     provenance: {
753:       sessionIds:
754:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
755:       promptSummary:
756:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
757:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
758:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
759:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
760:             : null,
761:       transcriptUrl:
762:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
763:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
764:           : null,
765:       reviewContextRef:
766:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextRef && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextRef === 'object'
767:           ? (report.provenance.reviewContextRef as ReviewContextRef)
768:           : null,
769:       reviewContextStats:
770:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextStats && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextStats === 'object'
771:           ? report.provenance.reviewContextStats
772:           : undefined,
773:     },
774:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
775:   };
776: 
777:   if (report?.summary) {
778:     response.summary = report.summary;
779:   }
780:   if (typeof report?.summaryText === 'string') {
781:     response.summaryText = report.summaryText;
782:   }
783:   if (typeof report?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean') {
784:     response.furtherPassesLowYield = report.furtherPassesLowYield;
785:   }
786:   if (report?.intent) {
787:     response.intent = report.intent;
788:   }
789:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
790:     response.error = {
791:       code: record.error_code,
792:       message: record.error_message,
793:     };
794:   }
795: 
796:   return response;
797: }

799: /**
800:  * Create a new checkpoint job in the database
801:  */
802: export async function createCheckpointJob(
803:   db: D1Database,
804:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
805: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
806:   const result = await db
807:     .prepare(
808:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
809:          id,
810:          prompt,
811:          model,
812:          status,
813:          phase,
814:          source_type,
815:          checkpoint_id,
816:          commit_sha,
817:          source_ref,
818:          source_project_root,
819:          build_run_tests_if_present,
820:          build_run_lint_if_present,
821:          source_bundle_key,
822:          source_bundle_sha256,
823:          source_bundle_bytes
824:        )
825:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
826:        RETURNING *`
827:     )
828:     .bind(
829:       input.id,
830:       input.prompt,
831:       input.checkpointId,
832:       input.commitSha,
833:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
834:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
835:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
836:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
837:       input.sourceBundleKey,
838:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
839:       input.sourceBundleBytes
840:     )
841:     .first<JobRecord>();
842: 
843:   if (!result) {
844:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
845:   }
846: 
847:   return toJobResponse(result);
848: }

885: /**
886:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
887:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
888:  */
889: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
890:   const result = await db
891:     .prepare(
892:       `UPDATE jobs
893:        SET status = 'running',
894:            phase = 'building',
895:            started_at = ?,
896:            error_message = NULL,
897:            error_code = NULL
898:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
899:     )
900:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
901:     .run();
902: 
903:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
904:   return changes > 0;
905: }

907: /**
908:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
909:  */
910: export async function appendJobEvent(
911:   db: D1Database,
912:   input: {
913:     jobId: string;
914:     attemptNo?: number;
915:     eventType: string;
916:     phase: JobPhase;
917:     payload: unknown;
918:   }
919: ): Promise<number> {
920:   const sequenceResult = await db
921:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
922:     .bind(input.jobId)
923:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
924: 
925:   if (!sequenceResult) {
926:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
927:   }
928: 
929:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
930:   await db
931:     .prepare(
932:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
933:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
934:     )
935:     .bind(
936:       input.jobId,
937:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
938:       seq,
939:       input.eventType,
940:       input.phase,
941:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
942:     )
943:     .run();
944: 
945:   return seq;
946: }

948: /**
949:  * List persisted job events from a given sequence.
950:  */
951: export async function listJobEvents(
952:   db: D1Database,
953:   jobId: string,
954:   fromExclusive = 0,
955:   limit = 500
956: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
957:   const result = await db
958:     .prepare(
959:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
960:        FROM job_events
961:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
962:        ORDER BY seq ASC
963:        LIMIT ?`
964:     )
965:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
966:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
967: 
968:   return result.results.map((row) => {
969:     let payload: unknown;
970:     try {
971:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
972:     } catch {
973:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
974:     }
975: 
976:     return {
977:       seq: row.seq,
978:       eventType: row.event_type,
979:       phase: row.phase,
980:       payload,
981:       createdAt: row.created_at,
982:     };
983:   });
984: }

986: /**
987:  * Update job status
988:  */
989: export async function updateJobStatus(
990:   db: D1Database,
991:   id: string,
992:   status: JobStatus,
993:   additionalFields?: {
994:     phase?: JobPhase;
995:     started_at?: string | null;
996:     completed_at?: string | null;
997:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
998:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
999:     preview_url?: string;
1000:     deployed_url?: string;
1001:     code_url?: string;
1002:     code_zip_url?: string;
1003:     error_message?: string | null;
1004:     error_code?: string | null;
1005:     retry_count?: number;
1006:     file_count?: number;
1007:     // Metrics fields
1008:     prompt_tokens?: number;
1009:     completion_tokens?: number;
1010:     total_tokens?: number;
1011:     cost?: number;
1012:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
1013:     install_duration_ms?: number;
1014:     build_duration_ms?: number;
1015:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
1016:     total_duration_ms?: number;
1017:     lines_of_code?: number;
1018:   }
1019: ): Promise<void> {
1020:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
1021:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
1022: 
1023:   if (additionalFields) {
1024:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
1025:       updates.push('phase = ?');
1026:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
1027:     }
1028:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
1029:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
1030:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);
1031:     }
1032:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
1033:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');
1034:       values.push(additionalFields.completed_at);
1035:     }
1036:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
1037:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
1038:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
1039:     }
1040:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
1041:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
1042:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
1043:     }
1044:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
1045:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
1046:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
1047:     }
1048:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
1049:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
1050:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
1051:     }
1052:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
1053:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
1054:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
1055:     }
1056:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
1057:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
1058:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
1059:     }
1060:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1061:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1062:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1063:     }
1064:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1065:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1066:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1067:     }
1068:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
1069:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
1070:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
1071:     }
1072:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
1073:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
1074:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
1075:     }
1076:     // Metrics fields
1077:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
1078:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
1079:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
1080:     }
1081:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
1082:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
1083:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
1084:     }
1085:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
1086:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
1087:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
1088:     }
1089:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
1090:       updates.push('cost = ?');
1091:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
1092:     }
1093:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
1094:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
1095:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);
1096:     }
1097:     if (additionalFields.install_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1098:       updates.push('install_duration_ms = ?');
1099:       values.push(additionalFields.install_duration_ms);
1100:     }
1101:     if (additionalFields.build_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1102:       updates.push('build_duration_ms = ?');
1103:       values.push(additionalFields.build_duration_ms);
1104:     }
1105:     if (additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1106:       updates.push('deploy_duration_ms = ?');
1107:       values.push(additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms);
1108:     }
1109:     if (additionalFields.total_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1110:       updates.push('total_duration_ms = ?');
1111:       values.push(additionalFields.total_duration_ms);
1112:     }
1113:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
1114:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
1115:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
1116:     }
1117:   }
1118: 
1119:   values.push(id);
1120: 
1121:   await db
1122:     .prepare(`UPDATE jobs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1123:     .bind(...values)
1124:     .run();
1125: }

1127: /**
1128:  * Mark job as cancelled
1129:  */
1130: export async function markJobCancelled(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<void> {
1131:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1132:   await updateJobStatus(db, id, 'cancelled', {
1133:     phase: 'cancelled',
1134:     cancel_requested_at: now,
1135:     cancelled_at: now,
1136:     completed_at: now,
1137:   });
1138: }

1200: /**
1201:  * Update workspace status and selected metadata.
1202:  */
1203: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(
1204:   db: D1Database,
1205:   id: string,
1206:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1207:   additionalFields?: {
1208:     baseline_ready?: number;
1209:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1210:     error_code?: string | null;
1211:     error_message?: string | null;
1212:   },
1213:   options?: {
1214:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1215:   }
1216: ): Promise<boolean> {
1217:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1218:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1219: 
1220:   if (additionalFields) {
1221:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1222:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1223:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1224:     }
1225:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1226:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1227:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1228:     }
1229:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1230:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1231:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1232:     }
1233:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1234:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1235:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1236:     }
1237:   }
1238: 
1239:   values.push(id);
1240: 
1241:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1242:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1243:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1244:   }
1245: 
1246:   const result = await db
1247:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1248:     .bind(...values)
1249:     .run();
1250: 
1251:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1252: }

1301: /**
1302:  * Append a sequenced workspace event and return sequence number.
1303:  */
1304: export async function appendWorkspaceEvent(
1305:   db: D1Database,
1306:   input: {
1307:     workspaceId: string;
1308:     eventType: string;
1309:     payload: unknown;
1310:   }
1311: ): Promise<number> {
1312:   const sequenceResult = await db
1313:     .prepare('UPDATE workspaces SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
1314:     .bind(input.workspaceId)
1315:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
1316: 
1317:   if (!sequenceResult) {
1318:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace ${input.workspaceId}`);
1319:   }
1320: 
1321:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
1322:   await db
1323:     .prepare(
1324:       `INSERT INTO workspace_events (workspace_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
1325:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
1326:     )
1327:     .bind(input.workspaceId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
1328:     .run();
1329: 
1330:   return seq;
1331: }
1332: 
1333: /**
1334:  * List persisted workspace events from a given sequence.
1335:  */
1336: export async function listWorkspaceEvents(
1337:   db: D1Database,
1338:   workspaceId: string,
1339:   fromExclusive = 0,
1340:   limit = 500
1341: ): Promise<WorkspaceEventItem[]> {
1342:   const result = await db
1343:     .prepare(
1344:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
1345:        FROM workspace_events
1346:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND seq > ?
1347:        ORDER BY seq ASC
1348:        LIMIT ?`
1349:     )
1350:     .bind(workspaceId, fromExclusive, limit)
1351:     .all<WorkspaceEventRecord>();
1352: 
1353:   return result.results.map((row) => {
1354:     let payload: unknown;
1355:     try {
1356:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
1357:     } catch {
1358:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
1359:     }
1360: 
1361:     return {
1362:       seq: row.seq,
1363:       eventType: row.event_type,
1364:       payload,
1365:       createdAt: row.created_at,
1366:     };
1367:   });
1368: }

1370: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1371:   db: D1Database,
1372:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1373: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1374:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1375:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1376:     .prepare(
1377:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1378:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1379:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1380:        LIMIT 1`
1381:     )
1382:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1383:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1384: 
1385:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1386:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1387:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1388:     }
1389: 
1390:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1391:     if (!existingOperation) {
1392:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1393:     }
1394:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1395:   }
1396: 
1397:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1398:     await db
1399:       .prepare(
1400:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1401:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1402:       )
1403:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1404:       .run();
1405:   }
1406: 
1407:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1408:   const operationId = input.id;
1409: 
1410:   const operationRecord = await db
1411:     .prepare(
1412:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1413:          id,
1414:          workspace_id,
1415:          type,
1416:          status,
1417:          actor_id,
1418:          auth_principal_json,
1419:          request_payload_json,
1420:          request_payload_sha256,
1421:          idempotency_key,
1422:          warnings_json
1423:        )
1424:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1425:        RETURNING *`
1426:     )
1427:     .bind(
1428:       operationId,
1429:       input.workspaceId,
1430:       input.type,
1431:       input.actorId ?? null,
1432:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1433:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1434:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1435:       input.idempotencyKey
1436:     )
1437:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1438: 
1439:   if (!operationRecord) {
1440:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1441:   }
1442: 
1443:   try {
1444:     await db
1445:       .prepare(
1446:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1447:            id,
1448:            workspace_id,
1449:            operation_type,
1450:            idempotency_key,
1451:            operation_id,
1452:            request_payload_sha256,
1453:            expires_at
1454:          )
1455:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1456:       )
1457:       .bind(
1458:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1459:         input.workspaceId,
1460:         input.type,
1461:         input.idempotencyKey,
1462:         operationId,
1463:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1464:         expiresAt
1465:       )
1466:       .run();
1467:   } catch (error) {
1468:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1469:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1470:       throw error;
1471:     }
1472: 
1473:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1474:       .prepare(
1475:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1476:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1477:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1478:          LIMIT 1`
1479:       )
1480:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1481:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1482: 
1483:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1484:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1485:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1486:     }
1487:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1488:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1489:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1490:     }
1491: 
1492:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1493:     if (!existingOperation) {
1494:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1495:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1496:     }
1497:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1498:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1499:   }
1500: 
1501:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1502: }
1503: 
1504: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1505:   db: D1Database,
1506:   workspaceId: string,
1507:   operationId: string
1508: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1509:   const result = await db
1510:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1511:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1512:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1513: 
1514:   if (!result) {
1515:     return null;
1516:   }
1517: 
1518:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1519: }

1521: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1522:   db: D1Database,
1523:   workspaceId: string,
1524:   operationId: string
1525: ): Promise<boolean> {
1526:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1527:   const result = await db
1528:     .prepare(
1529:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1530:        SET status = 'running',
1531:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1532:            updated_at = ?
1533:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1534:     )
1535:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1536:     .run();
1537: 
1538:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1539: }

1541: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1542:   db: D1Database,
1543:   operationId: string,
1544:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1545:   options?: {
1546:     result?: unknown;
1547:     warnings?: unknown[];
1548:     errorCode?: string | null;
1549:     errorClass?: string | null;
1550:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1551:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1552:     startedAt?: string | null;
1553:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1554:   }
1555: ): Promise<void> {
1556:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1557:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1558: 
1559:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1560:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1561:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1562:   }
1563:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1564:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1565:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1566:   }
1567:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1568:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1569:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1570:   }
1571:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1572:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1573:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1574:   }
1575:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1576:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1577:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1578:   }
1579:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1580:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1581:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1582:   }
1583:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1584:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1585:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1586:   }
1587:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1588:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1589:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1590:   }
1591:   if (status === 'running') {
1592:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1593:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1594:   }
1595:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1596:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1597:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1598:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1599:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1600:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1601:   }
1602: 
1603:   values.push(operationId);
1604: 
1605:   await db
1606:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1607:     .bind(...values)
1608:     .run();
1609: }

1704: export async function createWorkspaceTask(
1705:   db: D1Database,
1706:   input: CreateWorkspaceTaskInput
1707: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1708:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1709:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1710:     .prepare(
1711:       `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1712:        FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1713:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1714:        LIMIT 1`
1715:     )
1716:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1717:     .first<{ task_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1718: 
1719:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1720:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1721:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1722:     }
1723: 
1724:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.task_id);
1725:     if (!existingTask) {
1726:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${existingIdempotency.task_id}`);
1727:     }
1728: 
1729:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1730:   }
1731: 
1732:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1733:     await db
1734:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_task_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
1735:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1736:       .run();
1737:   }
1738: 
1739:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1740:   const taskRecord = await db
1741:     .prepare(
1742:       `INSERT INTO workspace_tasks (
1743:          id,
1744:          workspace_id,
1745:          status,
1746:          prompt,
1747:          provider,
1748:          model,
1749:          idempotency_key,
1750:          request_payload_json,
1751:          request_payload_sha256,
1752:          max_steps,
1753:          max_retries,
1754:          actor_id,
1755:          tool_policy_json
1756:        )
1757:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
1758:        RETURNING *`
1759:     )
1760:     .bind(
1761:       input.id,
1762:       input.workspaceId,
1763:       input.prompt,
1764:       input.provider,
1765:       input.model,
1766:       input.idempotencyKey,
1767:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),

1977:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
1978:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
1979:   }
1980: 
1981:   await db
1982:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_tasks SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1983:     .bind(...values)
1984:     .run();
1985: }

1987: export async function requestWorkspaceTaskCancel(
1988:   db: D1Database,
1989:   workspaceId: string,
1990:   taskId: string
1991: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
1992:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1993:   const queuedResult = await db
1994:     .prepare(
1995:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
1996:        SET status = 'cancelled',
1997:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
1998:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
1999:            error_code = NULL,
2000:            error_message = NULL,
2001:            updated_at = ?
2002:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2003:     )
2004:     .bind(now, now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
2005:     .run();
2006: 
2007:   const runningResult = await db
2008:     .prepare(
2009:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
2010:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2011:            updated_at = ?
2012:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2013:     )
2014:     .bind(now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
2015:     .run();
2016: 
2017:   const task = await getWorkspaceTask(db, workspaceId, taskId);
2018:   return {
2019:     task,
2020:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2021:   };
2022: }

2024: export async function appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(
2025:   db: D1Database,
2026:   input: {
2027:     workspaceId: string;
2028:     taskId: string;
2029:     eventType: string;
2030:     payload: unknown;
2031:   }
2032: ): Promise<number> {

2038:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();

2046:   await db
2047:     .prepare(

2049:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2050:     )
2051:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.taskId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
2052:     .run();

2054:   return seq;

2057: export async function listWorkspaceTaskEvents(
2058:   db: D1Database,
2059:   workspaceId: string,
2060:   taskId: string,
2061:   fromExclusive = 0,
2062:   limit = 500
2063: ): Promise<WorkspaceTaskEventItem[]> {

2065:     .prepare(
2066:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
2067:        FROM workspace_task_events
2068:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND task_id = ? AND seq > ?
2069:        ORDER BY seq ASC
2070:        LIMIT ?`
2071:     )
2072:     .bind(workspaceId, taskId, fromExclusive, limit)
2073:     .all<WorkspaceTaskEventRecord>();

2075:   return result.results.map((row) => {
2076:     let payload: unknown;
2077:     try {
2078:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
2079:     } catch {
2080:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
2081:     }
2082: 
2083:     return {
2084:       seq: row.seq,
2085:       eventType: row.event_type,
2086:       payload,
2087:       createdAt: row.created_at,
2088:     };
2089:   });
2090: }
